releases.title: Curriculum Intelligence Centre — Phase 1 Navigation
releases.summary: Introduced the Curriculum Intelligence Centre navigation model with a persistent Curriculum Tree, Year Group → Scheme → Unit → Lesson browsing, navigation context, curriculum health indicators and fast teaching sequence access.

releases.title: Inherited Year Group Mapping Fix
releases.summary: Fixed Curriculum Centre filtering by deriving Year Group, Key Stage and Scheme metadata from the parent Scheme of Work when units or lessons do not store these fields directly. Empty placeholder schemes are now hidden from filters. 2025-2026 lessons remain Completed.

releases.name: Project X v4.0 Release 0
releases.summary: Defines the technical and philosophical foundation for Project X as a Teaching Operating System.

releases.name: Project X v4.0 Release 0.1
releases.summary: Separates user help, engineering documentation and published documents into distinct areas.

releases.name: Project X v4.0 Release 0.5
releases.summary: Adopts exam_system.db as the canonical development database for curriculum, assessment, teaching, AI and analytics, with JSON exports for the current GitHub Pages runtime.

releases.title: Database-Powered Curriculum Centre
releases.summary: Rebuilt Curriculum Centre around the database-derived curriculum model from Release 0.5.

releases.title: Academic Year Completion Fix
releases.summary: Marked all 2025-2026 lessons as Completed and bumped Curriculum Centre localStorage key to avoid stale planned statuses.
